DP.090.0000:
I gathered up a lot of Berries, so
I’m trading them in for Accessories.\f
I’m this close to being ready for
the Contests in Hearthome City.
DP.090.0001:
Badges from Gyms, or Contest wins...
There’s more than just one way to\f
be a winner, it seems.
Here’s hoping you’ll find something\f
in which you can be the victor.
DP.090.0002:
Hahaha! I’ve got you now!
I’m gonna take your Flag!
DP.090.0003:
You can’t catch me!
I set some Traps!
